input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.11.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.11.3.1
            TITLE: the tsms ev.7.9.3 must be locked in the off position when any work is done on the vehicle.

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.11.3.1: The TSMS EV.7.9.3 must be locked in the OFF position when any work is done on the vehicle.
EV.11.3.1 The TSMS EV.7.9.3 must be locked in the OFF position when any work is done on the vehicle.

final_answer: The TSMS EV.7.9.3 must be locked in the OFF position when any work is done on the vehicle.
